title: Aerobe Humidifier for Bedroom with 12 Extra Filters, 500ML Cool Mist Humidifiers for Home and Plants, Humidifiers for Baby with 12~16 Working Hours, Waterless Auto-Off Mini Humidifier
features: ✨Advanced Mist & Light Modes: Aerobe’s cool mist humidifier offers two mist modes (continuous or intermittent) and soothing light settings(bright or breathing)—Making it a perfect humidifier for bedroom or humidifier for plants to enhance your space and mood.

🛡️Smart Auto Shut-Off for Safe, Unattended Use: This air humidifier features smart auto shut-off when water runs low, to prevent overheating & saving electricity. letting you to run it overnight or while unattended, making it a safe humidifier for bedroom baby.

💤Quiet Operation for Undisturbed Rest: The air humidifier for bedroom that runs whisper-quiet (28dB), ideal as a room humidifier or humidifier for baby or at places where even the slightest sound can be a distraction.

💧Healthier Air for Skin, Breathing & Allergy Relief: By maintaining ideal humidity levels, this humidifiers for home helps relieve dry skin, nasal irritation, allergies, and discomfort. It also promotes better sleep quality and overall well-being in dry or air-conditioned environments.

✅Worry-Free Use with 1-Year Replacement Guarantee: Enjoy added peace of mind with a full 1-year replacement warranty. If anything goes wrong, we've got you covered—making this mini humidifier not just a wellness essential, but a long-term investment in your comfort and health.
description: Product Description How To Use The Aerobe Portable Humidifier? Four easy steps to the refreshed environment Step 1: Rotate the cover counterclockwise to remove it from the humidifier. Step 2: Pour water into the water tank until it reaches the desired level. Step 3: Tighten the cover by rotating it clockwise. Connect the humidifier to a USB power source. Step 4: Press the button once to activate the Continuous mist mode & twice to activate the intermittent mist mode. The third Press will turn off the humidifier. Note: If you try to turn on the room humidifier with no water, it will blink a red light 3 times and turns off. Enjoy the improved humidity in your space! Remember to clean and maintain the humidifier regularly for optimal performance. Warm Night Light Functionality Long Press the Power button once to active the continuous light mode Long Press the Power button twice to active the breathing light mode Long Press the Power button thrice to turn of the Night light mode Aerobe Suggestions for better performance of the humidifier To avoid adding Essential Oils! They can damage the mini humidifier and prevent it from working properly. Stick to tap or mineral water, not distilled or purified water. Using the wrong type can lower the mist spraying power of water humidifier which would result in water falling on the unit. If the humidifier doesn't spray initially, fill it with water and wait 5 minutes to wet the filter completely. The filter's spring is crucial for its functionality. With time, limescale builds up in the car humidifiers tank. Clean the humidifiers tank with alcohol, vinegar, or a descaling agent. Regularly clean the h20 humidifier, ideal is to wash daily, and replace the filter every 20-30 days. Remember, prolonged use of baby humidifier in closed spaces can encourage mold growth. Ensure proper air circulation.
